_comment: Hand-maintained skill-source corrections (P5; provenance §4). The master flat eventSkills list disagrees with GameTora's chain∪random eventData on these cards: each skill below is granted by a friend/group card's date (outing) events, which GameTora classifies as neither chain nor random, so the generator defaults them to 'random_event'. This file re-types them to 'date_event'. Computed from the pinned c1fa2107 data on 2026-06-12; re-verify when refreshing upstream. Related mismatches needing NO override: 4 R cards (10041, 10044, 10050, 10055) have zero event skills on both sides; 5 cards (20048, 30053, 30098, 30099, 30100) have event skills only in GameTora eventData, which the generator already classifies as chain/random; Twin Turbo 30026 dual-lists Early Lead (200532) as chain AND random — the generator counts it as chain.

10021._comment: Tazuna Hayakawa R [Tracen Academy] — Tail Held High comes from her date events.

10022._comment: Aoi Kiryuin R [Tracen Academy] — Lay Low / Hesitant End Closers / Shake It Out come from her date events.

10060._comment: Riko Kashimoto R [Tracen Academy] — Sympathy comes from her date events.

10074._comment: Sasami Anshinzawa R [Tracen Academy] — Uma Stan comes from her date events.

20021._comment: Aoi Kiryuin SR — same date-event skills as her R version.
